_doc: Char-count baselines for each LLM prompt template. PromptSizeProbeTest reads this file and asserts each template's rendered prompt stays below its ceiling. When a prompt shrinks by >15% the test logs a warning prompting the developer to update the baseline to lock in the gain. When updating, set 'chars' to the new measured value, 'ceiling' to ~chars * 1.15 (≈15% headroom for additive future tweaks), fill 'updatedBy' with the issue or PR number, and explain the change in 'reason'.

contractPrompt.reason: Re-baselined after migrating BpmnContractPromptFactory to bpmner/extract_contract.jinja + element includes. Char delta -37 (-0.48%) from the previous appendLine output.

generationPrompt.reason: Re-baselined after migrating BpmnContractGenerationPromptFactory to bpmner/generate_bpmn.jinja. Char delta -2 (-0.01%); template renders byte-near-identical to the appendLine output.

alignmentPrompt.reason: Re-baselined after migrating BpmnAlignmentPromptFactory to bpmner/check_alignment.jinja. Char delta -4 (-0.12%).

readinessPrompt.reason: Re-baselined after migrating BpmnReadinessPromptFactory to bpmner/assess_readiness.jinja. Char delta -2 (-0.04%).
